titleZh: 新《公司法》视角下的家族企业传承
titleEn: Family Business Succession under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 围绕家族企业组织安排、股权传承与类别股机制，讨论新《公司法》框架下的章程设计和纠纷预防方案。
abstractEn: Examines family ownership transition under the revised Company Law and highlights drafting points for succession, control, and continuity risk management.
